XDebugGetSystemVersion

The XDebugGetSystemVersion function retrieves a string that describes the version of the Xbox system software used by this console.

Important   To use this function, you must link with XapilibD.lib, the debug version of Xapilib. Retail (shipping) title builds should not call this function.

DWORD XDebugGetSystemVersion(
  LPSTR pszVersionString,
  UINT cchVersionString
);

Parameters

pszVersionString
[out] Pointer to a buffer that receives the version string.
cchVersionString
[in] specifies the size, in characters, of the pszVersionString buffer.

Return Values

The return value is XVER_RETAIL for retail versions of the system software, and XVER_DEVKIT for debug versions.

Remarks

This function returns a version string that describes the version of the Xbox system software used by this console. For example, "1.00.3230.1".

This string is intended for logging purposes only. The string should not be parsed to obtain version numbers, as the exact format of the string is neither specified nor guaranteed to remain constant.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Winbase.h, for include use Xtl.h.
Import Library: Use Xapilib.lib

See Also

Debugging Functions | XDebugGetXTLVersion
